title: URO Tier 1 — T6: EFAS engine (Phase 1) + replay UI + scenario library
description: Sixth and final child deliverable of URO Tier 1 parent arc d-2026-06-05-eb-tier1-ros-overlay-foundation per LUHTECH-EB-TIER1-ROS-OVERLAY-STRATEGY-2026-06-07 §5 + §8.T6. Implements EFAS Spec v1.0 Phase 1 (Foundation) ONLY — Phases 2/3/4 (transform library expansion + integration + learning loop) are F2-class follow-on per R8 + R9. Adds efas_engine_node.py: PCA projection from 374-factor state vector to k=12 eigenmode space, bounded path enumeration for SDI = log₁₀(count of valid paths reaching goal region), 16 starter transforms surfaced via lookup table. Publishes /efas/state at 0.2 Hz (luhtech_msgs/EFASState; 12 eigenmode values + SDI scalar + current factor vector) and /efas/alerts on threshold cross (luhtech_msgs/EFASAlert; tier per SDI cascade thresholds >10⁶→T1 ... ≤10¹→T7). Adds EFASOverlay browser extension: alert beam visualization at affected voxels + SDI corner widget + 12 eigenmode bar chart. Adds browser replay UI (play/pause/scrub/speed) using @mcap/core + @mcap/browser libraries for client-side .mcap consumption (NOT server-side ros2 bag play). Authors 4 scenarios: worker_walks_l2, crane_failure, inspection_fail, wagon_progression (YAML files consumed by scenario_controller_node from T2). Validation proof-point: SDI gauge visibly responds to scripted events (crane_failure shows SDI dip below 10⁵, triggers Tier 2 alert), .mcap files downloadable + playable in stock Foxglove desktop. Closes URO Tier 1 parent arc — all 6 children S7-merged. Full dev → staging → prod escalation procedural embedded in validation.postMerge[].

outputs.description: efas_engine_node.py — ROS 2 node implementing EFAS Spec v1.0 Phase 1 Foundation. State vector: 374 discrete factors (100 tasks × 3 + 10 resource types × 3 + 20 risks × 2 + 4 global constraints) sourced from voxel_groups + pm_decisions + project state. Projection: hardcoded PCA matrix W (12 × 374) projecting to 12-mode eigenspace per EFAS Spec v1.0 §3.2. Named modes: λ₁ Progress, λ₂ Critical Path, λ₃ Resource Balance, λ₄ Cost Trajectory, λ₅ Quality Trend, λ₆ Risk Exposure, λ₇–λ₁₂ subsystem modes. Publishes /efas/state at 0.2 Hz (luhtech_msgs/EFASState) and /efas/alerts on threshold cross (luhtech_msgs/EFASAlert) per SDI cascade thresholds in §4 strategy doc. Subscribes /box/groups/snapshot + /box/groups/deltas from T5 box_simulator; consumes simulator events from hsx/rsx/msx/isx/esx nodes (T2).
acceptanceCriteria: efas_engine_node registered in luhtech_uro_sim/setup.py entry_points (ros2 run luhtech_uro_sim efas_engine_node succeeds)
ros2 topic list shows /efas/state and /efas/alerts
ros2 interface show on /efas/state matches luhtech_msgs/EFASState landed at T1 (eigenmodes[12] + sdi + factor_vector[374] + timestamp)
ros2 interface show on /efas/alerts matches luhtech_msgs/EFASAlert landed at T1 (tier 1-7 + affected_voxel_urn + transform_id + threshold + timestamp + reason)
ros2 topic hz /efas/state reads 0.2 Hz ±10% during scenario playback
Node respects ROS_DOMAIN_ID isolation; foxglove_bridge surfaces topics to browser
Unit test test_efas_engine.py covers cold-start factor vector load + steady-state cycle + alert threshold cross

outputs.description: EFAS PCA projection matrix W (12 × 374) implementation in projection_matrix.py. Matrix is HARDCODED per Phase 1 boundary (NOT learned from data — that is Phase 4 learning loop scope per R9). Sourced from EFAS Spec v1.0 Appendix B projection matrix or computed once from canonical seed data and committed verbatim. Documented: each row of W corresponds to one named eigenmode; column ordering matches state-vector documented in efas_engine_node.py header.
acceptanceCriteria: projection_matrix.py exports a single constant W: np.ndarray of shape (12, 374), dtype=float64
W is committed verbatim (not computed at import time); docstring explains source (EFAS Spec v1.0 Appendix B or seed computation)
Test test_efas_projection.py: W @ test_state_vector returns shape (12,) within expected eigenmode bounds; row-norm sanity check (rows are orthonormal per PCA construction)
No external data dependencies at import (no Spaces fetch, no DB query) — Phase 1 boundary preserved
DEC entry in decision-log.json: 'd-2026-06-09-efas-projection-matrix-hardcoded-phase-1' locks the matrix source + rationale (Phase 1 NOT learning loop)

outputs.description: SDI bounded-path enumeration in sdi_path_enumerator.py. SDI = log₁₀(count of valid paths reaching goal region from current eigenmode state). Bounded per Phase 1: max path depth = 8 steps; max enumeration time = 50ms per cycle (0.2 Hz tick has 5000ms budget, conservative). Goal region defined per scenario YAML (target eigenmode values + acceptable tolerance). Returns count + log₁₀ scalar.
acceptanceCriteria: sdi_path_enumerator.py exports compute_sdi(eigenmode_state, goal_region, max_depth=8, max_time_ms=50) -> tuple[int, float]
Test test_efas_sdi.py: known small scenario returns deterministic count (no random); SDI matches log₁₀(count)
Max time budget respected: timer-bounded enumeration returns partial count on overrun with warning logged
Goal region schema documented (target_eigenmodes[12] + tolerance_per_mode[12])
DEC entry in decision-log.json: 'd-2026-06-09-sdi-bounded-enumeration-phase-1' locks max_depth=8 + max_time_ms=50 as Phase 1 bounds

outputs.description: 16 starter transforms in transforms_v1_0.yaml + Python loader in transforms.py. Per EFAS Spec v1.0 Appendix A: 5 categories (Resource, Schedule, Scope, Risk, Quality) × averaging 3-4 each = 16 transforms. Each transform: id + name + category + characteristic_eigenvalue_effects (sparse vector of which eigenmodes shift and by how much) + applicability_condition (which factor patterns trigger transform). Multiplicative composition supported: T_collapsed = T₁ · T₂ · ... · Tₖ in eigenspace. transforms.py exposes lookup_transform(transform_id) and compose_transforms(transform_ids[]).
acceptanceCriteria: transforms_v1_0.yaml contains exactly 16 entries spanning 5 categories (no category empty)
Each entry has required fields: id, name, category, eigenvalue_effects (12-element sparse vector), applicability_condition
transforms.py loads YAML at module init; lookup_transform(id) returns transform object
compose_transforms([id1, id2, id3]) returns multiplicative composition with correct eigenvalue arithmetic

ajv canonical 3-flag validation passes against efas-transforms.schema.json (new schema authored as part of T6 — surface for SR-chat catalog add if not already present, or use generic JSON schema validation)
DEC entry in decision-log.json: 'd-2026-06-09-efas-transforms-v1-0-16-starters' locks the 16-transform set as Phase 1 boundary; Phase 2 expansion captured as FU

outputs.description: EFASOverlay browser extension on Speckle Viewer 2.0 OVERLAY layer. Subscribes to /efas/state + /efas/alerts via foxglove_bridge WS. Renders: alert beam at affected_voxel_urn coordinates (vertical light beam with tier color: T1 red, T2 orange, T3 yellow, T4-T7 progressive), SDI corner widget (gauge + current value with log scale), 12 eigenmode bars (horizontal bar chart of current eigenmode magnitudes). Decay-out animation on alert dismissal (transform applied, threshold cleared). Integrates with T4 raycaster click selection (clicking alert beam shows detail panel with transform recommendations).
acceptanceCriteria: efas-overlay.ts exports EFASOverlay class extending Speckle Extension pattern (constructor takes viewer + WS client)
Subscribes to /efas/state + /efas/alerts via T3 browser WS client (@foxglove/ws-protocol)
Alert beam renders at world-space coords resolved from affected_voxel_urn (lookup against voxel_groups data from T5)
SDI corner widget reads /efas/state.sdi and renders log-scale gauge; color shifts at tier thresholds (>10⁶ red, 10⁵-10⁶ orange, etc.)
12 eigenmode bars render with named labels (λ₁ Progress, λ₂ Critical Path, ...); update at 0.2 Hz
Alert decay-out animation: 1s fade-out on alert resolution event
Vitest covers state update + alert add/remove + decay timing in efas-overlay.test.ts
Playwright e2e in tests/uro/efas-scenario.spec.ts asserts alert beam visible within 1s of crane_failure event injection

outputs.description: Browser replay UI (play/pause/scrub/speed) using @mcap/core + @mcap/browser. Client-side .mcap consumption (NOT server-side ros2 bag play per R5 + strategy doc §2 'Browser scrub UX: client-side via @mcap/core'). ReplayControls component: play/pause toggle, scrub bar (current_time + duration), speed selector (0.25x, 0.5x, 1x, 2x, 4x). ReplayController class: loads .mcap file from URL, decodes messages, dispatches into existing overlay update pathways (replaces live WS messages while replay active). Mode toggle: live (WS) ↔ replay (mcap).
acceptanceCriteria: replay-controller.ts exports ReplayController class with load(url), play(), pause(), seek(time), setSpeed(rate), dispose()
mcap-client.ts wraps @mcap/core + @mcap/browser for browser-side decoding; exposes streaming iterator over messages
ReplayControls component (React) wires to ReplayController; renders play/pause + scrub slider + speed dropdown
Scrub rewind reproduces prior state: seek backward, current overlay state matches what was rendered at that timestamp
.mcap file downloadable via UI 'Download bag' button; downloaded file plays in stock Foxglove desktop (manual verification, screenshot in _msg/SCREENSHOTS/)
Mode toggle: switching live↔replay disconnects WS / disconnects replay correctly; no message-source overlap
Vitest covers ReplayController state machine in replay-controller.test.ts + mcap-client.test.ts

outputs.description: 4 scenarios authored as YAML files consumed by scenario_controller_node (T2). worker_walks_l2: HSX worker walks through Level 2 ROOM zone over 60s; benign baseline (no SDI dip expected). crane_failure: RSX crane fails mid-lift at 90s; affects DECISION_ZONE for Level 1 South MEP clash; SDI dips to <10⁵, Tier 2 EFAS alert. inspection_fail: ISX inspection failure on Grid B3 at 45s; affects MEP system group; SDI dips to <10⁶, Tier 3 alert. wagon_progression: ESX material wagon progression across Levels 0→1 over 120s; demonstrates resource interpolation; no SDI threshold cross.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 YAML files present at infrastructure/uro-sim/scenarios/ with valid scenario_controller_node schema
Each scenario produces an .mcap file when played via uro-sim entrypoint rosbag2 recording
Playback via /dev/uro replay UI: each scenario plays end-to-end (play button) without errors
crane_failure: SDI gauge drops below 10⁵ within 1s of scripted event; EFAS alert beam appears at affected voxel within 1s
inspection_fail: SDI drops below 10⁶ within 1s; Tier 3 alert tier color (yellow)
wagon_progression: no SDI threshold cross; smooth lerp interpolation of wagon position visible in browser
Each .mcap downloadable and playable in stock Foxglove desktop (manual verification per scenario)

outputs.description: /dev/uro/replay page route in apps/web-dashboard/src/routes/uro/replay/page.tsx. Renders Speckle Viewer 2.0 substrate + locked Speckle backdrop (T3 substrate) + VoxelGroupOverlay (T4) + ResourcePresenceOverlay (T4) + EFASOverlay (T6 OUT-5) + ReplayControls (T6 OUT-6) + ScenarioSelector. ScenarioSelector lists 4 scenarios with metadata (name, duration, expected SDI behavior); selecting one loads the corresponding .mcap into ReplayController.
acceptanceCriteria: /dev/uro/replay route registered + accessible from dev.ectropy.ai after authentication
Page renders Speckle backdrop + all overlays without console errors
ScenarioSelector lists 4 scenarios with correct metadata
Selecting a scenario loads .mcap + plays without errors; alert behaviors match per OUT-7 acceptance
Manual visual confirmation: dashboard captures all 4 scenarios in _msg/SCREENSHOTS/ (01-worker_walks_l2.png ... 04-wagon_progression.png)
Browser FPS reading >30 fps during replay with all overlays active (METRICS.txt)

outputs.description: EB-local SPEC.md at .dlp/deliverables/d-2026-06-09-eb-tier1-t6-efas-replay/SPEC.md per F0B85LNSTC4 doctrine. Documents EFAS Phase 1 Foundation boundary explicitly (per R9 + R8); Phase 2/3/4 are F2-class follow-on. Captures projection matrix decision (hardcoded, NOT learned), SDI bounded enumeration parameters (max_depth=8, max_time_ms=50), 16-transform Phase 1 set, 4 scenarios + their expected behaviors. dev → staging → prod escalation procedural outlined. Dependency chain: T1 (luhtech_msgs EFAS message types) + T2 (scenario_controller_node + rosbag2 recording) + T3 (browser WS client) + T4 (VoxelGroupOverlay + display rules) + T5 (box_simulator + voxel_groups data).
acceptanceCriteria: SPEC.md authored at the specified path
Phase 1 boundary explicitly documented (k=12 hardcoded projection; max_depth=8; 16 transforms; NO learning loop)
All 4 scenarios documented with expected SDI behavior + alert tier
Dependency chain on T1-T5 enumerated

notes: T6 of URO Tier 1 Round 1 per LUHTECH-EB-TIER1-ROS-OVERLAY-STRATEGY-2026-06-07 §8.T6 + §4 math foundation. Substrate-correct critical path: PR 1.1 ✓ → PR 1.2 ✓ → T1 ✓ → T2 ✓ → T3 ✓ → T4 ✓ → T5 (sibling, must reach S7 first) → T6 ← this. Authored against EB main b9b4141511f806b6746cc8bba0192253b3c06793 + SR main cfcae53f00e394de155826df486ee163253ee382. EFAS Phase 1 Foundation boundary explicitly preserved per R9: hardcoded projection matrix W (NOT learned), max_depth=8 bounded path enumeration, 16 starter transforms (Phase 2 expansion is F2-class follow-on). Dual-process consumer (Success Stack, mediation layer) is F2-class follow-on per R8 — T6 produces EFAS state outputs only; consumer-side integration is post-Tier-1. Browser scrub UX: client-side @mcap/core + @mcap/browser per R5 + strategy doc §2 'Browser scrub UX: client-side via @mcap/core + @mcap/browser; NOT server-side ros2 bag play'. Full dev → staging → prod escalation embedded in validation.postMerge[] with [STAGE-DEV-N] / [STAGE-STAGING-N] / [STAGE-PROD-N] prefixes; each escalation has explicit L4 named-step gates per memory #4. Per-tarball _msg/ audit bundle per strategy doc §9: BUILD.log, TOPICS.txt, PROBES.txt, DB-STATE.txt, SCREENSHOTS/, METRICS.txt, CANARY.txt, BAG-VALIDATION.txt, L4-CHECKLIST.md. L4-CHECKLIST.md maps to OUT-1 through OUT-9 (OUT-10 is post-merge parent-arc closure scope, separate L4). Hard Constraint #1 (n8n PostgreSQL pipeline live) addressed via canary checks at every escalation stage (DEV/STAGING/PROD). T6 explicit dependencies: T1 (luhtech_msgs EFASState + EFASAlert message types), T2 (scenario_controller_node + rosbag2 recording), T3 (browser WS client + ws-protocol), T4 (VoxelGroupOverlay + display-rules + raycaster click selection), T5 (box_simulator publishing /box/groups/snapshot + voxel_groups data layer that EFAS state-vector reads). T6 PR cannot merge until T5 PR is on main (declared in validation.preMerge[0]); chat can author T6 spec + ROS node code in parallel with T5 execution. T6 closes URO Tier 1 parent arc: OUT-10 triggers parent-arc closure scope (SR-chat amends childDeliverables[] + authors parent TRUTH-DELIVERED — separate L4 named-step). Round 1 demo-ready posture per strategy doc §1 mission: technical/robotics-savvy audience (Dusty Robotics, Locus, 6 River, Boston Dynamics Orbit) sees genuine ROS architecture with real .mcap artifacts, standard topic conventions, voxel-as-spatial-primitive in nav_msgs/OccupancyGrid format their Nav2 stacks consume natively, EFAS/SDI as predictive optionality measurement. Round 2 (D2 warehouse polish + D3 drill-down) unblocks at parent-arc S7; F1 (Stage 8 auto-enrichment) + F2 (allocation engine + operator command surface + EFAS Phases 2/3/4) follow after Round 2. Cross-repo doctrine F0B85LNSTC4: this spec posted to #luhtech-agents-comms with file SHA256 + bytes + validation status; SR-chat lands anchor PR at schemas/_instances/deliverables/d-2026-06-09-eb-tier1-t6-efas-replay.json. Enterprise Excellence. Schema-First. No Shortcuts.
